intro.title: Setup — why we're in Frosthaven
lines: We finished **0 Howling in the Snow** and **1 A Town in Flames**: mercenaries escorting a Merchant Guild caravan to remote Frosthaven after the Imperial Pass thawed.

conditional.line: We took **Algox Offensive (3)** — **Algox Scouting (2)** is blocked, so we went straight at the Algox threat rather than scouting first.
We took **Algox Scouting (2)** — the offensive route is blocked.

arcs.title: Algox civil war
arcs.status: active, on the war path — mid-climax
trail_notes: At **Heart of Ice (4)** we opened the three big forks: **6** (Algox mountains), **7** (Lurkers), **8** (Unfettered).
arcs.plain_terms: The Algox are split (Snowspeakers vs Icespeakers) over how to worship **Geryuu**. We sided with the **Icespeakers**, saw corruption at **Skyhall**, and joined the faction pushing **total war** rather than emissary peace talks. That assault **failed** — the Algox main plot is paused mid-climax.

plain_terms_extra.line: **Summit Meeting (28)** is still on the table — peace talks may still be an option depending on what we read at Skyhall.
**War of the Spire B (30)** needs a retry (*Keihard gefaald*).

arcs.not_started_note: We have not done the Oracle / **Unyielding Shard** chain (**38**, **45–57**, **52**, etc.) — the deeper "true cause of Algox corruption" story is still ahead or on a branch we passed by.

arcs.title: Unfettered & Crain
arcs.status: factory arc done — Harbinger / seal may be next
trail_notes: Path into the complex: **Ancient Spire → Derelict Elevator → Buried Ducts (36)** — **The Dead Mile (37)** is blocked.
**Nerve Center (44) → Automaton Uprising (59)** — we chose **peace with the Orphan**; **58** is hidden/blocked.
**Collapsing Vent (98)** — escaped the collapsing facility after the Program Director fight.
arcs.plain_terms: **Crain Tallengyr**, the Unfettered **Orphan**, and whether machines and humans can coexist — the factory arc is **wrapped** (through **98**). The **Harbinger / seal** storyline (**61–64**) is still ahead.

building_hint.line: **Building 34** (Crain's workshop) is built to a high level — the **Harbinger / seal** arc (**61–64**) may unlock soon.

arcs.title: Lurkers & Coral Crown
trail_notes: Sea arc from **Edge of the World (7)**: fjords, shards, bathysphere thread through **42**.
arcs.plain_terms: **Coral Shards**, **Sun-in-Shallows**, rebuilding the Lurker kingdom — mid-arc, crown reunion not started.

arcs.title: Aesther elemental array
arcs.plain_terms: Elemental cores from four planes are in place; attunement went wrong and a **new rift** opened.

arcs.title: True Oak / Radiant Order
arcs.plain_terms: Savvas botanist **Listerius**, stolen notes, Radiant Order zealots — wrapped unless something reopens it.

arcs.title: Pinter's Copperneck road
arcs.plain_terms: Mountain pass construction — Horns of Ruin Algox bandits defeated at the pylons.

arcs.title: Mindthief in the woods
arcs.plain_terms: Influenced guards at the cabin cleared; trail leads to the **Black Barrow** near Gloomhaven.

arcs.title: Side / treasure-chest scenarios
arcs.plain_terms: Optional jobs from chests and events — not the main through-line, but they fill out the calendar and outpost life.
